title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE BARRIOS OF CAPAHU-AN AND GUINGAWAN, MUNICIPALITY OF DAGAMI, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF TABONTABON.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3586 / 53 OG No. 15, 4777 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1649, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE BARRIOS OF CAPAHU-AN AND GUINGAWAN, MUNICIPALITY OF DAGAMI, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF TABONTABON.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrios of Capahu-an and Guingawan Municipality of Dagami, Province of Leyte, are hereby transferred to the Municipality of Tabontabon.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
